meaning: n.庇萌,保护,庇护所,背风处adj.避风的,背风的,下风的,保护的
examples: Lee was ill so I went instead.
Lee tried to hide his excitement.
Lee was standing right behind her.
Mr. JOHN LEE (Investor): People are realizing that they have to take control of their money.
Looking back, Berners-Lee notes this could have all looked very arrogant 10 years ago.
